mapper.sql:
WHERE 1 = 1 AND p.use_yn = 'Y'
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND p.show_yn = #{showYn}

p.site_popup_seq, p.title, p.content, p.show_yn AS showYn, 'Y' AS popupYn, p.popup_type AS popupType, p.popup_width AS popupWidth, p.popup_height AS popupHeight, p.popup_pos_x AS popupPosX, p.popup_pos_y AS popupPosY, DATE_FORMAT(p.popup_start_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS popupStartDt, DATE_FORMAT(p.popup_end_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS popupEndDt, p.sort_order AS sortOrder, DATE_FORMAT(p.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_dt, DATE_FORMAT(p.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modify_dt
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM site_popup p WHERE p.site_popup_seq = #{sitePopupSeq} AND p.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT
FROM site_popup p WHERE p.use_yn = 'Y' AND p.show_yn = 'Y' AND (p.popup_start_dt IS NULL OR p.popup_start_dt <= NOW()) AND (p.popup_end_dt IS NULL OR p.popup_end_dt >= NOW()) ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.site_popup_seq DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT
FROM site_popup p WHERE p.site_popup_seq = #{sitePopupSeq} AND p.use_yn = 'Y' AND p.show_yn = 'Y' AND (p.popup_start_dt IS NULL OR p.popup_start_dt <= NOW()) AND (p.popup_end_dt IS NULL OR p.popup_end_dt >= NOW())
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_popup ( title, content, show_yn, use_yn, popup_type, popup_width, popup_height, popup_pos_x, popup_pos_y, popup_start_dt, popup_end_dt, sort_order, create_dt, create_id, create_ip, modify_dt, modify_id, modify_ip ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{showYn}, 'Y', #{popupType}, #{popupWidth}, #{popupHeight}, #{popupPosX}, #{popupPosY}, #{popupStartDt}, #{popupEndDt}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), #{createId}, #{createIp}, NOW(), #{modifyId}, #{modifyIp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE site_popup SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, show_yn = #{showYn}, popup_type = #{popupType}, popup_width = #{popupWidth}, popup_height = #{popupHeight}, popup_pos_x = #{popupPosX}, popup_pos_y = #{popupPosY}, popup_start_dt = #{popupStartDt}, popup_end_dt = #{popupEndDt}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, modify_dt = NOW(), modify_id = #{modifyId}, modify_ip = #{modifyIp} WHERE site_popup_seq = #{sitePopupSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE site_popup SET use_yn = 'N', modify_dt = NOW() WHERE site_popup_seq = #{sitePopupSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
